title: Aakhri Sawal Teaser | Yeh Sirf Shuruaat Hai | Sanjay Dutt | Namashi | Amit Sadh | Sameera Reddy

description:
What happens when a question isn’t just a question… but a weapon?
Aakhri Sawal follows Vicky, a brilliant yet volatile scholar, who ignites a nationwide controversy by publicly accusing his mentor, the legendary Professor Gopal Nadkarni, of institutional bias. What begins as an academic dispute soon spirals into a televised intellectual battlefield, fueled by media sensationalism and political agendas.
As the debate intensifies, it transforms into a psychological chess match. Vicky isn’t just debating history… he’s hunting for the truth. From the Gandhi assassination to the Emergency, no topic is off-limits.
But beneath the chaos lies a deeper mystery.
Jab sawaal sach se takraata hai… toh awaaz desh bhar mein goonjti hai.
#AakhriSawalTeaser Out Now!

Get ready to know the answer on 8th May only in cinemas.

Why is Vicky really doing this?
As secrets from the past begin to surface, Vicky prepares to ask his “Aakhri Sawal” — a question that has nothing to do with politics, but everything to do with a buried truth that could change everything.
The Question India Never Stopped Asking.

title: Captain Atom Vs Black Adam - (2026) Chris Hemsworth, Dwayne Johnson | Concept Trailer
tags: Captain Atom|Captain Atom trailer|Captain Atom 2026|Chris Hemsworth Captain Atom|Captain Atom movie|DC Captain Atom|Captain Atom official trailer|Chris Hemsworth DC|concept trailer|fan made trailer|Captain Atom teaser|DC superhero movie|Captain Atom first look|Chris Hemsworth superhero|upcoming DC movies|Captain Atom leak|DC Comics movie|nuclear superhero|Captain Atom official|Chris Hemsworth new movie|superhero origin story|Captain Atom release date
description:
#CaptainAtom #BlackAdam #chrishemsworth 

Watch Captain Atom Vs Black Adam Fan Made Concept Trailer Starring Chris Hemsworth, Dwayne Johnson & Morgan Freeman

Two of the most powerful beings in the DC universe finally collide. Chris Hemsworth steps into the role of Captain Atom, a military man turned living nuclear reactor who struggles to hold onto his humanity while carrying the power to level entire cities. On the other side, Dwayne Johnson brings the ruthless force of Black Adam, the ancient anti-hero who answers to no one and rules with an iron fist. When their paths cross, it's not just a battle of strength but a clash of ideologies. Morgan Freeman rounds out the cast as a government figure caught in the middle, trying to prevent a conflict that could reshape the world. The tension between duty and raw power drives every moment of this concept.

Putting this one together was a real labor of love. Somewhere around 10 hours went into crafting this trailer from start to finish. I went deep into the source material, studying how Captain Atom moves, how Black Adam carries himself, the weight behind every confrontation these two have had in the comics. Getting the pacing and tone right meant going through countless scenes and pulling the best reference points I could find. Multiple software tools and creative techniques went into building this, and honestly I'm pretty exhausted but really happy with how it turned out.

Disclaimer:
This is a fan-made concept trailer created purely for entertainment and creative purposes. All rights to Captain Atom and Black Adam belong to DC Comics, DC Studios, and Warner Bros. Discovery. This video is not affiliated with, sponsored by, or endorsed by any of these companies or individuals. No copyright infringement is intended, this project was made out of genuine love and respect for the original characters and stories. The use of Chris Hemsworth, Dwayne Johnson, and Morgan Freeman's likeness is purely for creative fan casting purposes and does not imply their actual involvement in any project.

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

title: LYODRA FT. ISKANDAR WIDJAJA - MELODI CINTA-MU TUHAN (OFFICIAL MUSIC VIDEO)
tags: HITS Records|Music Video|Music|Lyodra|Iskandar Widjaja|Melodi Cinta-Mu Tuhan|Religi|Lagu Rohani|Rohani|Rohani Kristen|Paskah|Lyodra lagu rohani|Lyodra Melodi Cinta-Mu Tuhan|Violin|Pop|Trending|Viral|Ballad
description:
Penyanyi muda Lyodra merilis lagu rohani pertamanya bersama violinis internasional, Iskandar Widjaja. Dirilis di bawah label rekaman HITS Records, lagu bertajuk “Melodi Cinta-Mu Tuhan” ini hadir bertepatan dengan peringatan wafatnya Yesus Kristus pada Jumat, 3 April 2026.

Ditulis oleh Ibu Liliana Tanaja Tanoesoedibjo, penggunaan kata “melodi” dalam judul lagu ini menjadi kiasan untuk menggambarkan kasih Tuhan yang indah, lembut, dan menenangkan, layaknya alunan musik. 

Nyala api Roh-Mu s’lalu setia memimpinku / Terangi jalanku / Sucikan hati dan pikiranku / Agar aku layak untuk datang di hadapan-Mu

Melalui setiap liriknya, Ibu Liliana menuangkan pengalaman pribadinya dalam merasakan kasih Tuhan yang nyata dan mampu mengubahkan hidupnya.
Kolaborasi yang kuat antara lirik yang mendalam dari Ibu Liliana, aransemen musik oleh Figgy Papilaya sebagai produser, permainan biola yang menyentuh dari Iskandar Widjaja, serta vokal penuh penghayatan dari Lyodra menjadikan lagu ini sangat cocok dijadikan refleksi dalam momen peringatan wafatnya Yesus Kristus.

Kita di tuntut hidup sebagai anak-anak  terang yang telah dianugrahi kasih karunia-Nya  agar taat kepada-Nya, tidak  menuruti hawa nafsu yang  menguasai pada waktu kebodohan kita, melainkan  hendaklah setiap  orang  menjadi kudus di dalam seluruh hidupnya sama seperti Dia yang kudus, yang telah memanggil kita. 

Rayakan kasih Tuhan yang hidup melalui “Melodi Cinta-Mu Tuhan” dari Lyodra dan Iskandar Widjaja yang bisa didengarkan di seluruh platform digital streaming. Nikmati juga video musiknya melalui kanal YouTube HITS Records.

Listen Now!

#Lyodra #IskandarWidjaja #MelodyCintaMuTuhan #MusicVideo 
====================================================
Melodi Cinta-Mu Tuhan [Lyrics]
Lyrics by: Liliana Tanoesoedibjo

Melodi itu terdengar sangat merdu 
Elok menggema.. merasuki.. dalam sanubari

Oh indahnya.. nada cinta.. kerajaan itu
Denting suara-Nya berseru  kuduslah engkau
Iramanya.. sungguh mengubahkan setiap hati

Tuhan.. yang kuingin hanya dekat  kepadaMu 
Untaian melodi cinta-Mu ubahkan hidupku
Hadirat-Mu Tuhan.. t’rangi  sluruh lang-kah kakiku

title: timelesz「４分間だけ時間をください」（YouTube ver.）
tags: timelesz|タイムレス|たいむれす|タム|TSZ|tsz|佐藤勝利|菊池風磨|松島聡|寺西拓人|原嘉孝|橋本将生|猪俣周杜|篠塚大輝|shori sato|fuma Kikuchi|so matsushima|takuto teranishi|yoshitaka hara|masaki hashimoto|syuto inomata|taiki shinozuka|Sexy Zone|セクシーゾーン|セクゾ|SZ
description:
■2026.4.29 Release
Album『MOMENTUM』より「4分間だけ時間をください」Music Video
フルサイズは、Album『MOMENTUM』【初回限定盤A】に収録。
詳しくはこちら⇒ https://ovtp.jp/9116749

ニューアルバム、もう一方のリード曲「4分間だけ時間をください」は、
疾走感あふれるバンドサウンドに溢れる心の声を重ねた情熱的なメッセージソング。
新体制発足から1年が経ち様々な経験を得たtimelesz。
その中心には常にファンの皆様をはじめ、たくさんの方々の支えがありました。
同曲はそんな皆様への感謝と愛をストレートに描いたラブソングにもなっています。

作詞・作曲: Atsushi Shimada / 坂室賢一
編曲: 南田健吾

Music Video Director：大喜多正毅

┈ ┈ ┈ ┈ ┈ ┈ ┈ ┈ ┈ ┈ ┈ ┈ ┈ ┈ ┈ ┈ ┈ ┈ ┈ ┈ ┈ ┈ ┈ ┈
新体制２作目となるニューアルバム『MOMENTUM』（読み：モーメンタム）
新たな家族と走り切った１年で得た多くの経験と感情を胸に、
“さらに勢いを増して進んでいこう”、“過去、現在、未来、一瞬一瞬を大切にしていこう”
というグループの意志をコンセプトにした今作。
この作品には、ポップスを軸に様々なジャンルを盛り込んだ、
キャッチーでtimeleszらしいJ-POP13曲が収録されます。

tags: 実況プレイ|ガッチマン|ホラーゲーム|キヨ|牛沢|レトルト|TOP4|Slay the Spire 2
description:
やりたくて収録外でも遊んじゃってるので、やっぱり撮ることにしました

スパイアの目覚め
究極の「デッキ構築型ローグライク」が帰ってきた！

1000年もの間、スパイアは眠りについていた。その秘密は埋もれ、かつての恐怖は忘れ去られていた。だが今、スパイアの口は再び開かれた。かつてないほどの飢えと危険をはらみ、挑む者すべてを食らい尽くさんとしている。

新たなる脅威に立ち向かうには、洗練された戦略、容赦なき狡猾さ、そして揺るぎない決意が必要だ。スパイアの過酷な試練を巧みに切り抜け、頂に隠された真実を解き明かせ。

孤独に頂を目指すか、あるいは仲間の冒険者たちと共に挑むのか。

tags: ドズル社|マイクラ|まいくら|マインクラフト|とずる社|どする社|ドズル社マイクラ|ドズル|おんりー|おらふくん|ぼんじゅうる|おおはらMEN|エンドラ|エンドラRTA|RTA大会
description:
日本トップクラスの走者たちが集結。
エンダードラゴン討伐までの最速タイムを競う、
「エンドラRTAトーナメント」

4月から11月にかけて毎月第一土曜日に大会が開催され、
各大会の優勝者は12月ファイナルトーナメントへの出場権を獲得！

最終決戦への切符を手に入れるのは誰だ…？

【エンドラRTAトーナメント選手募集フォーム】
https://branch-oyster-277.notion.site/302533b3099d80bfb015e7ef7ed15a4f

【実況・解説】
実況：ドズルhttps://www.youtube.com/@dozle_sub
解説：ひまゆさんhttps://x.com/HF_himayu

【走者一覧】
はるさめさんhttps://www.youtube.com/@harusame_0123
まささん https://www.youtube.com/@masa_ERC
豆腐さんhttps://youtube.com/@Mncr_tofu
ぴむさんhttps://www.youtube.com/@Pi1MuTINJUU
ちょーくさんhttps://www.youtube.com/@ちょーく_ERC
ぽるさん https://x.com/pooolll7_
おんりーさんhttps://www.youtube.com/@QnlyQ
飛び石のしゅんさんhttps://x.com/SYUN120919

【ルール】
・Minecraft 1.16.1 エンダードラゴン討伐RTA
・原則「同一ランダムシード」で対戦
・シード値は完全ランダム生成（MODによる自動化）
・起動構成は全員一律でドズル社提供のものを使う
・ワールド生成後は自動で一時停止状態になり、その後Discordの合図で2プレイヤーが一斉にスタート
・スタート合図『3、2、1、ご武運を！』＋スタートSE
・クリア条件：エンダードラゴン討伐後、中央に生成されるポータルに入りED画面が表示されたら
・競技中、他選手配信・本配信の視聴は禁止
・全ロスした際などいかなる場合でも、ワールドの再生成は禁止

・PC、通信などの個人のトラブルによる再走は認めない
・トラブルは原則続行、続行不可能な場合は失格とする
・トラブルから復帰後、相手がまだゴールしていない場合の続行はOK
・災害によるトラブルについては運営判断となる

【競技環境】
・Minecraft Java Edition Fabric 1.16.1
・シングルプレイ（通常ワールド）
・ワールドタイプ：Default（システムで自動生成）
・サバイバル / イージー
禁止事項：
指定外Mod・Datapack・ResourcePack・シェーダーの使用 / シード解析・マップ解析 / 指示なくワールド再生成
導入MOD：
SpeedrunAPI / Sodium / Lithium / Starlight / antigone / voyager / Extra Options / StandardSettings / ドズル社製大会専用Mod
その他：
Toolscreen、Ninjabrain-bot などspeedrun.com で承認されている外部ツールは、競技環境を崩さないものであれば使用可　※指定外Mod導入などはNG
※本大会での新記録はPB申請できません

▼ドズル社公式サイトはこちら！イベントなどの告知を確認できます
https://www.dozle.jp

▼メンバーシップ「ドズ主」の参加はこちら
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCj4PjeVMnNTHIR5EeoNKPAw/join

▼Discord ドズル社サーバーへの参加はこちら！
ファン同士の交流や、視聴者参加型企画の募集を行っています
https://discord.gg/yNUS9W6a8K

▼ドズル社×LEVEL∞ コラボPC
https://www.pc-koubou.jp/pc/game_dozle.php

▼みんなへ

ども！ドズルです！

概要欄からこんにちは！
こんなところまでチェックしてくれて、ありがとうございます。

ドズル社のことをもっと知りたい！！！って概要欄をひらいてくれたのかな？
そんなあなたに、伝えたいメッセージを書きます！

ドズル社はみんなの「人生というゲームをもっと楽しく」することを目的に活動しています。
僕たちのコンテンツを通じて、たくさん笑顔になってくれると嬉しいです。
みんなのゲームに登場する愉快なキャラクターになれていますか？


応援の方法もたくさんあります。
動画を見る、コメントする、グッズを買う、イベントに参加する、
ドズル社を話題にする、おすすめする、イラストを描く、切り抜きをする。

そのすべてが僕たちのパワーになって、みんなのおかげで楽しく活動できています！
本当にいつもありがとう！！！


ただ、一つだけ約束してください。
応援しすぎて、疲れないように！！！
みんなに楽しんでもらうために活動しているので、応援しすぎて疲れちゃうのは本末転倒です。

自分のペースで、ゆるーくながーく応援してくださいね。
それが一番うれしいです。

今日、動画を見てくれた人が、
明日も、来週も、来年も、10年後も見たくなるような動画を作りつづけたい！

全部の動画を見なくてもいいです。
たまに動画を見てくれるだけでも、本当に嬉しいです。
好きな時に、ふらっと動画を見にきてください。


ドズル社は新しいチャレンジをして、アップデートします。
将来どんなことができるか、ワクワクです。
一緒にドズル社の変化を楽しみながら、人生というゲームを楽しみましょう！


ドズルより

BGM courtesy of https://www.epidemicsound.com/

＃ドズル社#マイクラ#マインクラフト

☄Biography
現在高校2年生。15歳で『晩餐歌』をリリースすると、瞬く間に各チャートを席捲し、Billboard Japan Hot 100では1位に輝く。2024年12月「第66回輝く！日本レコード大賞」特別賞受賞および「第75回NHK紅白歌合戦」への初出場を果たす。2025年には初のフルアルバム「15」やTBSドラマ・日曜劇場「キャスター」主題歌『騙シ愛』など話題作を続々リリースし、「MUSIC AWARDS JAPAN 2025」では最優秀ニュー・アーティスト賞を受賞。2026年2月に初の有観客パフォーマンスを日本武道館単独公演にて開催。続く韓国・台湾・香港でのアリーナツアーも即日完売。2026年4月、初のTVアニメタイアップとなる「スノウボールアース」オープニングテーマ『零-zero-』を配信。リリース楽曲のストリーミング総再生回数は10億回を超え、世界中のオーディエンスをその歌声と楽曲で魅了している。

title: Destroying A World That Doesn't Exist
tags: wifies|mumbo jumbo|dream|wifies arg|at the crossroads dont turn left|the king in yellow
description:
A strange book appears in Avery's world warning him to run away, so he decides to investigate and hunt down the author - the missing player d3rlord3. But what he discovers inside his world is more than he could have ever imagined..

Avery's channel: @averylargemayo 

Voice of Avery: @andrewgaming677 
Voice of Abel/The Vessel: @Zeemyth 

ORIGINAL MUSIC BY: Ben Bracey (@benbraceymusic on instagram) 
https://soundcloud.com/benbraceymusic/sets/destroying-a-world-that-doesnt


DO NOT READ BELOW FOR SPOILERS:


d3rlord3's channel: @dhutchins333 


This is just a little part of the description where I talk about the video and there is a LOT to say about this guy. The reason this video is so long is because it was originally going to be two parts (a part 2 and a part 3) but the ending of part 2 was a little weak (end of Avery's pov) and I just felt part 3 would require way too much context. Soo we combined them into one.

I think I'm gonna post a full behind the scenes/deleted scenes video on my second channel @Twifies where I talk about how this video was made/why certain decisions were made. But something I really like are all the little headnods to some of my favorite pieces of fiction. Some more explicit, like in the library, but if you ever watched Adventure Time then those lines from the King should have sounded pretty familiar. 

This is easily the longest I've ever spent on a video and I never want it to happen again lol it feels unnatural to wait this long between uploads. I promise I'll be back to normal soon. This will either age well or it's not but this video feels pretty different from part 1 which gets me kind of scared. I think this video is lowkey not that scary, or at least it's not dense with scares and I might have lost the plot of what made part 1 good. But who knows. I think the ending slaps and the weakest scenes are (as always) the parts where you try and force fear. Aka mountain chase, and that chase after the floor disappears beneath Avery in the gray buildings. I just think you can't force fear and tension is where it shines. But who knows I've watched this video so many times I can't tell anymore. 

A note to the villain, I don't think of this as "The King in Yellow" perse, if anything it follows more from the Lovecraftian adaptation, Hastur. But I think this guy is my own adaptation of that adaptation. A King x Bill Cipher x The Lich if that makes any sense. 

Also if you want to support the project/download any of the builds then check them out here. You get every single world featured here + the world from part 1, all for $5:

BUILDS: https://horacecreations.com/products/dtl

I also want to say thank you to a few people bc without them this video would have been completely impossible. So a massive thank you to:
- Zeemyth for not only voicing but helping so much with writing the written books
- Horace and the entire team at HoraceCreations for being so good to work with and making this possible in the first place with their incredible building
- AndrewGaming67 for being so flexible and talented with the voice acting
- Wato and Kenadian for helping me with the more technical feats you've seen (ie boat phasing)
- Ben for the music and being so open to ideas and revisions
- Rekrap2 for sending me that shulker in the sky thing 4 years ago
- Parrot for all the advice and for motivating me to keep making better videos 
- Speedish for recording with me for hours and hours and sitting through my quality checks with me
- YOU for watching :) I really appreciate it 

➤➤ Twitter: https://twitter.com/WifiesWasTaken
➤➤ Discord: https://discord.gg/zAWUuWb


➤➤Links:

Tim Stephenson/The King: https://www.fiverr.com/tim_stephenson/record-a-deep-terrifying-cinematic-villain-voiceover-for-you

EPIDEMIC MUSIC I USE: https://share.epidemicsound.com/1xis5q/?playlist=uad3vzakh605efvoqoi24llhnpr9lm2y

🎵 Copyrighted music licensed from Lickd. https://lickd.co

While My Guitar Gently Weeps (Live from Madison Square Garden, New York, U.S.A, 1971 / 2009 Remaster) by George Harrison, https://t.lickd.co/l/oOPdvzdZ73p

This is NOT series called Minecraft VVSauce where I explore random features of Minecraft. Not Secret Minecraft things or Minecraft lore (like Game Theory) or Escape Rooms, but a crazy super long unfiction video where Averythemayo and d3rlord3 search for the king in yellow? But not really the king in yellow. If anything it's more like hastur x the lich x bill cipher. Not even an arg but you can call it that. It's just video where stuff goes DOWN.

title: Supergirl | Official Trailer
tags: 2026|Coming Soon|Craig Gillespie|DC|DC Comics|DC Studios|DCU|David Krumholtz|Emily Beecham|Eve Ridley|James Gunn|Jason Momoa|Kara Zor-El|Krypto|Matthias Schoenaerts|Milly Alcock|Supergirl|WB|Warner Bros|Warner Bros Pictures|Warner Brothers|official trailer
description:
This Summer, find your place in the universe. #Supergirl lands in theaters and IMAX June 26.

“Supergirl,” DC Studios’ newest feature film to hit the big screen, will be in theaters worldwide this summer from Warner Bros. Pictures, starring Milly Alcock in the dual role of Supergirl/Kara Zor-El. Craig Gillespie directs the film from a screenplay by Ana Nogueira.

When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.

Alcock stars alongside Matthias Schoenaerts, Eve Ridley, David Krumholtz, Emily Beecham, and Jason Momoa.

DC Studios heads Peter Safran and James Gunn are producing the film, which is based on characters from DC, Supergirl based on characters created by Jerry Siegel and Joe Shuster. The film is executive produced by Nigel Gostelow, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther. Behind the camera, Gillespie is joined by director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer Neil Lamont, editor Tatiana S. Riegel, costume designers Anna B. Sheppard and Michael Mooney, Visual Effects Supervisor Geoffrey Baumann, music supervisor Susan Jacobs and composer Claudia Sarne.

DC Studios Presents a Troll Court Entertainment / The Safran Company Production, A Film by Craig Gillespie, “Supergirl,” which will be in theaters and IMAX ® across North America on June 26, 2026, and internationally beginning 24 June 2026, distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures.

title: FORGOTTEN ISLAND | Official Trailer
description:
Forgotten Island - In Theaters September 25

Your best friendship is worth fighting for.

DreamWorks Animation, the studio that brought you unforgettable bonds between a boy and a dragon in How to Train Your Dragon, an ogre and a donkey in Shrek, and a robot and a gosling in The Wild Robot, now welcomes a dazzling and emotional story about two lifelong best friends who must come together before they drift apart in Forgotten Island. 

The new original film is written and directed by Academy Award® nominee Joel Crawford and Januel Mercado and is produced by Academy Award® nominee Mark Swift, the filmmaking team behind Puss in Boots: The Last Wish. 

Grammy and Academy Award® winning supernova H.E.R. and Liza Soberano (Lisa Frankenstein, Alone/Together) star as high school graduates Jo and Raissa, who have been best friends since grade school but are now about to embark on separate life paths. 

While celebrating their last night together, Jo and Raissa stumble upon a mysterious portal that transports them to the fantastical island of Nakali, packed with magical and mythological creatures they grew up hearing stories about from their Filipino families.  
Some of these figures will become friends, some foes. Joined by well-meaning-but- hapless weredog Raww (Dave Franco) and a small-but-mighty pack of pals, Jo and Raissa must face The Dreaded Manananggal (Tony winning icon Lea Salonga), the most feared creature on the island. When they discover that the memories of their entire friendship are the price for returning home, Jo and Raissa will race to find a way to leave the island before they forget each other forever. 
The film’s all-star voice cast also includes Emmy nominee Jenny Slate (Marcel the Shell with Shoes On, Dying for Sex), Manny Jacinto (The Good Place, Top Gun: Maverick), BAFTA nominee Dolly de Leon (Triangle of Sadness, Ghostlight), global comedy superstar Jo Koy (Haunted Mansion, Jo Koy: Live from Brooklyn) and Emmy winner Ronny Chieng (The Daily Show, M3GAN).  

DreamWorks Animation’s Forgotten Island is distributed by Universal Pictures.

Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

Sau 10 năm kể từ Trận Đồ Bát Quái, cặp đôi Lương Thế Thành và Lê Phương chính thức tái hợp trong phim mới Bóng Ma Hạnh Phúc. Nếu trước đây từng vào vai mẹ – con đầy tréo ngoe, thì lần này họ hóa thân thành vợ chồng trong một câu chuyện hôn nhân đầy sóng gió.
Lương Thế Thành vào vai Hoàng Dũng – một CEO thành đạt nhưng đứng giữa ranh giới của trách nhiệm gia đình và những cám dỗ bên ngoài. Trong khi đó, Lê Phương gây ấn tượng với hình ảnh người vợ Thanh Mai dịu dàng nhưng mạnh mẽ, buộc phải đối diện với sự thật phũ phàng ngay trong chính mái ấm của mình.
Với kịch bản nhiều kịch tính cùng dàn diễn viên thực lực, “Bóng Ma Hạnh Phúc” hứa hẹn mang đến câu chuyện sâu sắc về hôn nhân, lòng tin và giá trị của hạnh phúc gia đình.

RU NỬA VẦNG TRĂNG - GIỌNG CA DỊU DÀNG NGHE RẤT CUỐN ► Trúc Linh Bolero (Official MV 4K) 
💃 Thưởng thức liên khúc Rumba Bolero sến xưa ngọt ngào và sâu lắng, với giọng ca truyền cảm của ca sĩ Trúc Linh - người mang đến phong cách hát nhẹ nhàng, da diết và đậm chất hoài niệm.
Cùng với hình ảnh người mẫu xinh đẹp, đầy đặn và giai điệu bolero bất hủ, video sẽ đưa bạn trở về không gian âm nhạc mộc mạc, gần gũi của những năm tháng yêu thương xưa cũ.

🌹 Trúc Linh Bolero hân hạnh giới thiệu đến quý khán giả những liên khúc nhạc vàng, bolero, rumba trữ tình chọn lọc, nơi giọng hát Trúc Linh hòa cùng âm thanh mộc mạc, tạo nên những phút giây thư giãn và lắng đọng tâm hồn.

👉 Dành tặng cho những ai yêu thích nhạc sến xưa, bolero trữ tình, rumba quê hương, và đặc biệt là những khán giả luôn dõi theo giọng hát Trúc Linh Bolero - người giữ lửa cho dòng nhạc xưa đầy cảm xúc.

🔔 ĐĂNG KÝ & BẬT CHUÔNG để không bỏ lỡ những liên khúc bolero sến xưa chọn lọc mỗi ngày.

title: Supergirl | Official Trailer
tags: 2026|Coming Soon|Craig Gillespie|DC|DC Comics|DC Studios|DCU|David Krumholtz|Emily Beecham|Eve Ridley|James Gunn|Jason Momoa|Kara Zor-El|Krypto|Matthias Schoenaerts|Milly Alcock|Supergirl|WB|Warner Bros|Warner Bros Pictures|Warner Brothers|official trailer
description:
This Summer, find your place in the universe. #Supergirl lands in theaters and IMAX June 26.

“Supergirl,” DC Studios’ newest feature film to hit the big screen, will be in theaters worldwide this summer from Warner Bros. Pictures, starring Milly Alcock in the dual role of Supergirl/Kara Zor-El. Craig Gillespie directs the film from a screenplay by Ana Nogueira.

When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.

Alcock stars alongside Matthias Schoenaerts, Eve Ridley, David Krumholtz, Emily Beecham, and Jason Momoa.

DC Studios heads Peter Safran and James Gunn are producing the film, which is based on characters from DC, Supergirl based on characters created by Jerry Siegel and Joe Shuster. The film is executive produced by Nigel Gostelow, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther. Behind the camera, Gillespie is joined by director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer Neil Lamont, editor Tatiana S. Riegel, costume designers Anna B. Sheppard and Michael Mooney, Visual Effects Supervisor Geoffrey Baumann, music supervisor Susan Jacobs and composer Claudia Sarne.

DC Studios Presents a Troll Court Entertainment / The Safran Company Production, A Film by Craig Gillespie, “Supergirl,” which will be in theaters and IMAX ® across North America on June 26, 2026, and internationally beginning 24 June 2026, distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures.

title: Supergirl | Official Trailer
tags: 2026|Coming Soon|Craig Gillespie|DC|DC Comics|DC Studios|DCU|David Krumholtz|Emily Beecham|Eve Ridley|James Gunn|Jason Momoa|Kara Zor-El|Krypto|Matthias Schoenaerts|Milly Alcock|Supergirl|WB|Warner Bros|Warner Bros Pictures|Warner Brothers|official trailer
description:
This Summer, find your place in the universe. #Supergirl lands in theaters and IMAX June 26.

“Supergirl,” DC Studios’ newest feature film to hit the big screen, will be in theaters worldwide this summer from Warner Bros. Pictures, starring Milly Alcock in the dual role of Supergirl/Kara Zor-El. Craig Gillespie directs the film from a screenplay by Ana Nogueira.

When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.

Alcock stars alongside Matthias Schoenaerts, Eve Ridley, David Krumholtz, Emily Beecham, and Jason Momoa.

DC Studios heads Peter Safran and James Gunn are producing the film, which is based on characters from DC, Supergirl based on characters created by Jerry Siegel and Joe Shuster. The film is executive produced by Nigel Gostelow, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther. Behind the camera, Gillespie is joined by director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer Neil Lamont, editor Tatiana S. Riegel, costume designers Anna B. Sheppard and Michael Mooney, Visual Effects Supervisor Geoffrey Baumann, music supervisor Susan Jacobs and composer Claudia Sarne.

DC Studios Presents a Troll Court Entertainment / The Safran Company Production, A Film by Craig Gillespie, “Supergirl,” which will be in theaters and IMAX ® across North America on June 26, 2026, and internationally beginning 24 June 2026, distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures.

description:
What happens when a question isn’t just a question… but a weapon?
Aakhri Sawal follows Vicky, a brilliant yet volatile scholar, who ignites a nationwide controversy by publicly accusing his mentor, the legendary Professor Gopal Nadkarni, of institutional bias. What begins as an academic dispute soon spirals into a televised intellectual battlefield, fueled by media sensationalism and political agendas.
As the debate intensifies, it transforms into a psychological chess match. Vicky isn’t just debating history… he’s hunting for the truth. From the Gandhi assassination to the Emergency, no topic is off-limits.
But beneath the chaos lies a deeper mystery.
Jab sawaal sach se takraata hai… toh awaaz desh bhar mein goonjti hai.
#AakhriSawalTeaser Out Now!

Get ready to know the answer on 8th May only in cinemas.

Why is Vicky really doing this?
As secrets from the past begin to surface, Vicky prepares to ask his “Aakhri Sawal” — a question that has nothing to do with politics, but everything to do with a buried truth that could change everything.
The Question India Never Stopped Asking.

Performed live by Sami Yusuf and Atif Aslam at the Etihad Arena in Abu Dhabi in November 2025, ‘Mast Qalandar’ is a celebrated qawwali of the Indian subcontinent, deeply rooted in centuries of Sufi tradition. The piece is based on a devotional poem attributed to the renowned Sufi poet and musical pioneer Amir Khusro, later expanded and enriched by the verses of the great Punjabi mystic Bulleh Shah. Its lyrics express reverence (not worship) for Ali ibn Abi Talib—who holds central importance in Sufi spiritual lineage—and pay tribute to the revered 12th-century saint Lal Shahbaz Qalandar of Sindh.

Equally central to ‘Mast Qalandar’ is its powerful musical structure. Built on the traditional qawwali form, the piece unfolds through dynamic call-and-response passages, rhythmic handclaps, and a gradual intensification of tempo and energy. Driven by harmonium, sitar, percussion, and layered vocals, the music creates a state of spiritual elevation, where repetition and improvisation draw both performers and listeners into a shared experience of ecstasy. This intricate interplay between melody, rhythm, and vocal expression is what gives the qawwali its enduring emotional and spiritual impact.

Widely popularized in the modern era by Nusrat Fateh Ali Khan, ‘Mast Qalandar’ has become one of the most iconic expressions of Sufi musical tradition, embodying themes of spiritual love and transcendence.

Performed brilliantly here by two contemporary musical icons.

AAAHHHH 😱🚪💥 NO VÍDEO DE HOJE EU ENTREI COM MINHA MÃE NUMA DAS EXPERIÊNCIAS MAIS MALUCAS DO ROBLOX: WOULD YOU RATHER BUT IT HAPPENS BRAINROT!!! 🤯🧠🎮

A CADA ESCOLHA TUDO ACONTECIA DE VERDADE 😵‍💫🔥 TEVE BRAINROT PRA TODO LADO, MEME SEM SENTIDO, PORTAS MALUCAS, PERSONAGENS BIZARROS, BICHO DE ESTIMAÇÃO DOIDO, MÚSICA DE BRAINROT 🎵🌀, FUNK DE BRAINROT 💃😂, CABEÇA TROCADA 🤡☕, AMIGO FUSÃO, DRAGÃO CANELONE 🍝🐉, ELEFANTE DE MORANGO 🍓🐘 E ATÉ MOMENTO EM QUE A GENTE FICOU GIGANTE E MINIATURA AO MESMO TEMPOOOO 🤏😆📏

EU TENTEI ESCOLHER AS MELHORES OPÇÕES, MAS QUASE SEMPRE DAVA RUIM 🤣💥 UMA HORA EU TAVA PULANDO, NA OUTRA VOANDO, DEPOIS CERCADO DE BRAINROT, DEPOIS GASTANDO ROBUX 💸🟢 PRA PEGAR AS ESCOLHAS MAIS ABSURDAS DO MAPA 😳🚪 E MINHA MÃE AINDA INVENTOU DE TESTAR AS DUAS PORTAS EM VÁRIAS HORAS PRA DEIXAR O CAOS MAIS ENGRAÇADO AINDA 😂🚨

TEVE SIX SEVEN, CROCODILO BOMBARDILO, PATAPIM, SIGMA BOY, CAPUTINA, TUNG TUNG, TRALALERO TRALALA E UM MONTE DE MEME BRAINROT QUE FEZ NOSSO CÉREBRO DERRETER NO MAPA 🤯🔥🧠 SERÁ QUE A MELHOR ESCOLHA ERA FICAR RICO DE ROBUX... OU SÓ SOBREVIVER MESMO? 😅💸🚪

E O PIOR DE TUDO: NO FINAL ATÉ A ESCOLHA DE CONTINUAR ASSISTINDO O ALEC GO VIROU UM DESASTRE 😱📺💨 ENTÃO JÁ DEIXA O LIKE, SE INSCREVE E COMENTA QUAL ESCOLHA DE BRAINROT VOCÊ FARIA NO ROBLOX: A MAIS ENGRAÇADA, A MAIS ASSUSTADORA OU A MAIS CARA DE ROBUX? 👀💬💛

Parintins se revela como um portal entre mundos, às margens do Rio Amazonas, guiada pelos encantados, entidades que transitam entre planos, não sendo nem plenamente humanas, nem plenamente sobrenaturais. Os encantados são presenças vivas da natureza, guardiões da vida e da nossa amada Parintins, a terra da arte e do encantamento.

O álbum 2026 é encantamento, um mergulho na ancestralidade da força do nosso povo.

description:
Eu achei que já tinha dado tudo errado… mas piorou.

Vou tentar salvar a companhia aérea, e os problemas só aumentam: passageiros mais exigentes, situações ainda mais absurdas e decisões que parecem sempre dar errado no pior momento possível.

Entre caos dentro do avião, erros atrás de erros e muita improvisação, eu sigo tentando manter tudo de pé… mesmo quando parece impossível.

Será que agora vai… ou a falência é inevitável?

Beloved by their millions of fans across the planet as Air Supply – have had nearly half a century to hone their skills, harness their passion and unleash the beautifully intimate yet rockin’ romantic energy of those instantly identifiable 80s hits that made them global superstars.

50 years since they met in the chorus of the Australian touring company of Jesus Christ Superstar, the duo is ever-present on the road in North America and overseas to the tune of 130 dates a year. What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

description: Since the beginning of time, the Trinity Gods rule the three worlds; Brahma - god who creates; Vishnu - god who protects and Shiva - god who transforms. As the realms of heaven, earth edge toward chaos, the Trinity god Vishnu descends to earth in an avatar to restore balance. This time, Vishnu is reborn as RAMA (Ranbir Kapoor), a human prince destined to restore balance. Opposing him, stands the most formidable, learned, undefeatable and immortal demon king RAVANA (Yash), blessed by the Trinity themselves, driven by pride and a vengeance powerful enough to shatter the cosmos.

description:
— Attention Viewers ⚠️
— This is a Fan-Made Concept Trailer for:
— Spider-Man 4

— In this concept trailer for Netflix Spider-Man 4, the story follows Peter Parker played by Tobey Maguire as he returns to his world after the events of No Way Home and tries to build a stable life with Mary Jane Watson played by Kirsten Dunst while raising their young daughter May Parker. Now older and more experienced, Peter faces a new kind of responsibility as he balances being a husband, a father, and a hero who can no longer afford to take risks the same way he once did. As he attempts to hold onto the life he has finally found, Adrian Toomes played by John Malkovich emerges with a personal mission that challenges Peter’s sense of responsibility and forces him to confront the consequences of his past decisions. With Mary Jane Watson caught between fear and trust, and Peter struggling to protect his family without losing himself, the story centers on the weight of second chances, the cost of keeping loved ones safe, and whether a man who has already given so much can still carry the burden of being Spider-Man.

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

title: Supergirl | Official Trailer
tags: 2026|Coming Soon|Craig Gillespie|DC|DC Comics|DC Studios|DCU|David Krumholtz|Emily Beecham|Eve Ridley|James Gunn|Jason Momoa|Kara Zor-El|Krypto|Matthias Schoenaerts|Milly Alcock|Supergirl|WB|Warner Bros|Warner Bros Pictures|Warner Brothers|official trailer
description:
This Summer, find your place in the universe. #Supergirl lands in theaters and IMAX June 26.

“Supergirl,” DC Studios’ newest feature film to hit the big screen, will be in theaters worldwide this summer from Warner Bros. Pictures, starring Milly Alcock in the dual role of Supergirl/Kara Zor-El. Craig Gillespie directs the film from a screenplay by Ana Nogueira.

When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.

Alcock stars alongside Matthias Schoenaerts, Eve Ridley, David Krumholtz, Emily Beecham, and Jason Momoa.

DC Studios heads Peter Safran and James Gunn are producing the film, which is based on characters from DC, Supergirl based on characters created by Jerry Siegel and Joe Shuster. The film is executive produced by Nigel Gostelow, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther. Behind the camera, Gillespie is joined by director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer Neil Lamont, editor Tatiana S. Riegel, costume designers Anna B. Sheppard and Michael Mooney, Visual Effects Supervisor Geoffrey Baumann, music supervisor Susan Jacobs and composer Claudia Sarne.

title: Schwarzer Snap!? Macht HBO Harry Potter aus Versehen RASSISTISCH?
tags: harry potter serie|harry potter reboot|hbo harry potter|snape casting|paapa essiedu|harry potter trailer|harry potter news|severus snape|harry potter controversy|harry potter reboot deutsch|harry potter
description:
Der erste Trailer zur neuen Harry Potter HBO-Serie ist da – und das Netz eskaliert komplett! Severus Snape wird von Paapa Essiedu, einem schwarzen Schauspieler, gespielt. Aber ist das wirklich "Empowerment" oder schießt sich HBO damit ein gigantisches wokes Eigentor?
Die Casting-News zum Harry Potter Reboot spalten das Internet. Während die einen von „Go woke, go broke“ sprechen, schauen wir uns an, was dieser Race-Swap inhaltlich bedeutet.
Wenn der arme, gemobbte Außenseiter Snape plötzlich schwarz ist und vom reichen, weißen, privilegierten James Potter zur Belustigung kopfüber an einem Baum aufgehängt wird... erschafft HBO dann aus Versehen eine extrem unangenehme, rassistische Dynamik in Hogwarts?
Außerdem sprechen wir über die unfassbare Heuchelei der Filmindustrie im Umgang mit J.K. Rowling, warum krampfhaftes Race-Swapping oft nur faule Marketing-Strategie ist und warum Paapa Essiedu einfach viel zu sehr nach Balenciaga-Model und zu wenig nach Keller-Incel aussieht. Und ganz wichtig: Wir müssen aufhören, uns von dieser künstlichen Empörungsmaschinerie manipulieren zu lassen. Morddrohungen gegen Schauspieler? Absolutes No-Go!

Schreibt mir eure ehrliche Meinung in die Kommentare: Seht ihr die Rassismus-Gefahr in der neuen Dynamik auch so, oder interpretiere ich da zu viel rein? Freut ihr euch auf die HBO-Serie?

title: Vor dem GTA-6-Sturm: Diese 6 Open-World-Spiele sollen unbedingt noch vorher raus!
tags: spiele|game|gameplay|games|gamestar|open world|gta VI|Grand theft Auto VI
description:
Wir verlosen gemeinsam mit Kia 1x2 Tickets für die CAGGTUS 2026 in Leipzig! Dort könnt ihr unter anderem den Kia EV2 und EV3 live vor Ort erleben - Hier mitmachen: https://forms.gle/iGrfssJiTAnFFqxB6
Alles zum Kia EV2: https://www.kia.com/de/modelle/ev2/entdecken/
Alles zum Kia EV3: https://www.kia.com/de/modelle/ev3/entdecken/ (WERBUNG)

GTA 6 erscheint - wenn alles klappt - am 16. November. Wir erwarten den Open World Hit 2026, der alles in den Schatten stellt. Aber was machen wir bis dahin? Zum Glück gibt's noch einen ganzen Haufen weiterer Open World-Games, die vor GTA 6 erscheinen und uns die Zeit bis zum Release verkürzen können. title: Zily -  CHÉRI NGUIZY (Clip Officiel)

Chéri Nguizy est une ode à l’amour doux et sensuel, inspiré des traditions d’autrefois.
C'est est un amour qui se savoure lentement, comme une douceur qu’on laisse fondre, entre complicité, respect et attraction.
À travers cette chanson, Zily nous plonge dans une ambiance chaleureuse et envoûtante, où la sensualité se mêle à la pureté des sentiments. Une invitation à aimer autrement : avec délicatesse, intensité et authenticité.

title: Supergirl peut-elle vraiment sauver le DCU ?
tags: supergirl|lanterns|superman|dcu|supergirl trailer|james gunn|lanterns trailer|dc|dc comics|dc studios|dcu chapter 1|milly alcock|warner bros|green lantern|supergirl woman of tomorrow|supergirl trailer reaction|supergirl trailer breakdown|warner bros pictures|superman trailer|jason momoa|batman|superman scene|peacemaker|lanterns teaser|superman movie|superman krypto|lex luthor|movie news|lobo|movie|super hero|justice league|clark kent|kevinbukkart
description:
💻 Créez votre entreprise en quelques clics avec LegalPlace et profite de –15 % avec le code BUKKART15 : https://go.legalplace.fr/bukkart

🚀 Pourquoi Supergirl pourrait-elle être bien plus qu’un simple spin-off de Superman dans le nouveau DCU ? Avec ce nouveau trailer, DC montre enfin que 2026 ne sera pas seulement une année de transition, mais un moment clé pour installer l’identité réelle de ce nouvel univers. Entre la reconstruction chaotique de Warner, le rôle central de James Gunn, l’arrivée d’une Kara beaucoup plus tragique que Clark, et les indices très clairs vers Brainiac, New Krypton et la suite de Superman, ce film pourrait bien être la véritable pierre angulaire du chapitre Gods and Monsters. Dans cette vidéo, on revient sur la situation actuelle de DC, sur la chronologie du DCU, sur tout ce que les trailers de Supergirl révèlent, et sur la manière dont le film prépare déjà les grandes confrontations à venir.

🔥 Retrouve tout l'univers Bukkart ici : https://www.kevinbukkart.com

Bon visionnage.

Ecriture : Kevin Bukkart
Montage : AlexCalibur

--------------------------------------------------

Time code :
0:00 Introduction
1:17 Sponso LegalPlace
3:35 DC: Déjà la crise
7:13 La Chronologie du DCU
12:26 Woman of tomorrow
20:23 Lobo: Le Main Man
24:25 Man of tomorrow



Au programme :
Pourquoi le rachat de Warner change totalement la perception actuelle du DCU.
Ce que le silence de James Gunn peut dire sur la situation du studio.
Pourquoi 2026 est la première vraie année du DCU hors des projets 100 % Gunn.
Comment la chronologie du DCU s’organise de The Suicide Squad jusqu’à Peacemaker saison 2.
Ce que Superman a réellement lancé dans le nouvel univers DC.
Pourquoi Supergirl arrive à un moment absolument décisif pour la suite du chapitre Gods and Monsters.
La différence fondamentale entre Clark Kent et Kara Zor-El dans le DCU.
Pourquoi Woman of Tomorrow est l’un des meilleurs matériaux possibles pour construire Supergirl.
Le poids du trauma kryptonien dans l’arc de Kara.
Le rôle de Ruthye et pourquoi elle est essentielle à la trajectoire émotionnelle du film.
Comment Krem et les Brigands de Barbond redéfinissent le ton du récit.
Pourquoi Lobo peut devenir l’un des grands atouts du DCU.
Ce que les trailers disent du rapport de Kara à la violence, à la vengeance et à l’héroïsme.
Pourquoi le film pourrait déjà préparer l’arrivée de Brainiac.
Comment Supergirl peut mener directement à Man of Tomorrow.
Le lien possible entre Argo City, New Krypton, Lex Luthor et la future guerre kryptonienne.
Pourquoi Lanterns et Supergirl semblent construire ensemble la prochaine grande menace du DCU.
En quoi Supergirl peut devenir le film qui définit enfin l’identité du DCU au cinéma.

The song carries a carefree message about living in the moment, letting go of stress, and choosing happiness no matter what life throws your way. With playful melodies and uplifting energy, the duo remind listeners that life is short, tomorrow is never guaranteed, and sometimes the best thing you can do is dance, celebrate, and create your own happiness.

투자 권유 아님: 본 채널의 어떠한 내용도 특정 가상자산 또는 투자 상품에 대한 매수·매도 추천, 투자 자문 또는 권유에 해당하지 않습니다. 모든 영상은 정보 제공을 목적으로 제작되었습니다.

투자의 책임: 가상자산 투자는 원금 손실의 위험이 매우 높은 고위험 투자입니다. 모든 투자 결정과 그에 따른 결과(수익 및 손실)에 대한 최종적인 책임은 전적으로 투자자 본인에게 있습니다. 본 채널의 정보로 인해 발생한 어떠한 손실에 대해서도 채널 운영자는 책임을 지지 않습니다.

법적·규제적 리스크 고지: 대한민국 법률상 미신고 해외 가상자산 거래소를 이용하는 행위는 특정금융정보법 등 관련 법규에 따라 법적 제재의 대상이 될 수 있는 리스크를 포함하고 있습니다. 관련 법률 및 규제는 언제든지 변경될 수 있으므로, 시청자께서는 본인의 책임 하에 충분한 법률 검토 후 이용 여부를 판단하시기 바랍니다.

정보의 한계: 본 채널에서 제공하는 정보는 제작 시점의 자료를 바탕으로 하며, 그 정확성, 완전성, 최신성을 보장하지 않습니다. 정보의 오류나 누락이 있을 수 있으므로, 이를 절대적인 투자 판단의 근거로 삼아서는 안 됩니다.

title: Виктор Цой и Курт Кобейн - “Кинонирвана”. Дуэт через время
tags: #airushv|#airush|AI|airushv music|цой|курт кобейн|nirvana|кино|юрий хой|михаил горшенёв|виктор цой и курт кобейн|кинонирвана
description:
«Кинонирвана»  - это музыкальная и визуальная фантазия о невозможном дуэте Виктора Цоя и Курта Кобейна, который смог состояться лишь за пределами времени и реальности.

В этой песне - энергия перерождения. Цой и Кобейн словно ведут разговор сквозь время .
Два мира - Ленинград 90-х и Сиэтл 90-х - соединяются в одной мелодии, где нет границ между прошлым и настоящим.
В клипе внимательные зрители заметят отсылки к Михаилу Горшенёву, Юрию Хою и Георгию Гурьянову.
Образы созданы с помощью технологий искусственного интеллекта и посвящены памяти музыкантов, чья правда звучит вечно.

🎵 Трек: «Кинонирвана»
👤 Исполнитель: AiRushV
✍️ Текст: Максим Васильев
💡 Автор проекта: Максим Васильев - @AiRushV

⚠️ Важно:
Мы не пытаемся скопировать голос какого-либо артиста, включая Виктора Цоя и Курта Кобейна. Эти голоса неповторимы. Мы делаем в похожем стиле разные эксперименты в меру своей фантазии. Рассматривайте нас как самостоятельный проект AiRushV.
Данное видео является художественным вымыслом и творческой интерпретацией.
Образы персонажей созданы с использованием технологий искусственного интеллекта и являются собирательными.
Видео создано как искренняя дань памяти и уважения кумирам и деятелям ушедшей эпохи.
Любые совпадения с реальными личностями и событиями случайны.

description:
OYUN YASAĞI ONAYLANDI (süre verildi)
OYUN DÜNYASINDA ŞOK KARAR: Yasak Resmileşti! 🎮🚫

Hepimizin korktuğu o haber sonunda geldi. Bir süredir tartışma konusu olan oyun kısıtlamaları/yasakları hakkında resmi onay çıktı ve geçiş süreci için beklenen süre verildi. Peki bu karar neleri kapsıyor? Hangi platformlar risk altında?

Bu videoda:

Yasak Kararının Detayları: Karar tam olarak neyi hedefliyor?

Verilen Süre: Oyuncuların ve yayıncıların ne kadar vakti var?

Gerekçeler: Bu radikal kararın arkasındaki temel sebepler neler?

Bundan Sonra Ne Olacak?: VPN kullanımı, alternatif platformlar ve topluluğun tepkisi.

Gelişmeleri kaçırmamak ve süreci birlikte takip etmek için videoyu beğenmeyi ve kanala abone olmayı unutmayın. Sizce bu karar oyun dünyasını nasıl etkileyecek? Yorumlarda buluşalım.

description:
Kulüpkuranparator :D
Sizi seviyorum❤



Bu videoda ultra zengin hesap ta yeni karakterler özel teklifler aldım ve 2000 elmastan tam 2 tane satın alıp yeni imparator kulüp kurduk. Yeni gelen brawl talk çok iyi gözüküyor. Kenji ile sıralamaya kastım ve prestij aldım. Bedava ücretsiz ödül açtım. Kutudan ücretsiz elmas çıktı. Her öldüğümde efsanevi ödüller aldığım videolar çekmeyi seviyorum. En hızlı 50 rütbe maks kademe ve 1000 kupa kasma taktikleri veriyorum.  En kolay kupa kasma taktikleri ni verdim. Buzz ışıkyılı kupa kasma taktikleri. Aşamalı modda kolay şekilde aşama ve  lig atlama taktikleri verdiğim videolar da var. Brawl Stars a sıfırdan başladım daha önce de brawl stars sıfır hesaba kupa kasma serisi çektim ve brawl stars a yeni gelen karakter gigi oynamak istiyorum. Brawl stars ta en iyi kostümler i satın aldım . Brawl Stars kaze , kenji , gigi , ziggy , mina , mortis ve edgar oynamayı seviyorum. Hedefim en iyi brawl stars videoları çekmek ve Türkçe brawl stars videoları çekmek. Diğer videoları kaçırmamak için abone olmayı unutmayın. Takipçilerle abonelerle oyunlar oynuyorum bildirimleri açarsanız ona da katılabilirsiniz. İyi seyirler.  #brawlstars #brawlstar #supercell #brawlpass

● الكلمات ●
انا اللي عاش واللي مات واللي شاف وسمع
وانا اللي لم يتعظ غير لما يتلدع
وانا الملاك والمخيف انا القوي والضعيف
انا اللي في الناس كفيف بشوف الكل جدع

اللي قدامكو ده حد ربك هداه
انت مين ياللي تيجي وتنكش معاه
اللي عيشته زمان غير دلوقتي يامان
كان في اصل واصول قبل فوات الاوان

ياعم عيب ده اللي زيك في حيط ادرى
ياعم ده اللي قصادك عمره مفترى
برغم قادر اكون اخطر كائن في الكون
بكره تسد الديون وتقول ياريت ما جرى

من يومين كنت شئ وانهارده بريئ
بس بكره في فكره ان هبقى جريئ
مش هجلي الكلام هبند السلام
بكفايه اللي عدا مع ناس بت حرام

لو في جهاز كشف عن العقول والدماغ
والنوايا اللي باخت خلت الكل بان
كان الجهاز ينفجر كله فكرو فجر
دي ناس من بره الفلوس من جوه ما توسو قرش ساغ

صاحبي صاحبي ده مين قالك اني حزين
انا بس في صدمه من غدر السنين
سرقت عمري هوا خلت سمي الدوا
يوم ما فوقت لقيت شكلي شاب واستوى

اخر كلام في المحادثه هقولك سلام
اصل اللي يحب يضحي مش حب كلام
سلام ياحب اتعدم سلام ياكبر ندم
هاخد قلبي اللي اتظلم وافوقو من الالم

هحكي حدوتي انا من وانا كام سنه
كنت لسه في حصه في حب وجدعنه
علموني الاصول جوه عالم وصولي
نسيو يدوني درس ابقا قاسي وهجومي

شوفت الصحاب في صبايا كانو كويسين
كبرو شويه في شويه بقو مدمنين
ادمنو الكيف والبكاسه وادمنو الخباسه
لو هرجع ليكو انتكاسه الطخطخ بينكو كييف

اول درس العذاب في كتاب غدر الصحاب
تالت درس الغيره في عين كلها انتداب
رابع درس القوي بيخافو منو اوي
يابا كنت تعلمني افتري ع المفتري

وخامس درس الفراق لما اداني قلم
خد مني ناس بعد منها سبني اتفرم
في دوامه الهموم بقيت بنسى بالسموم
بس ازاي انسى انا حلمي اللي ضاع واتردم

النهايه طريق مفيهوش ولا شئ
ولا مال ولا حب ولا في صديق
لو يرجع عمري تاني هختار اللي اشتاراني
مش هتعلق بحاجه مكنتش عشاني

وطول ما احنا عايشين هنفضل مستغربين
مش عارفين رايحين لفين ولا عارفين هتيجي من مين
استرها معانا يارب

مش زنبي اني حارقكوا

خلي و اخويا و زميلي

انت يلا اللي باقيلي ف كوكب بقي معدوم سلكان

Verse:

คอยดูแลแทคแคร์ไม่ให้คุณกลายเป็นสัปหลาด
เจออะไรมาผมจะกรองแน่นอนผมกลั่นสะอาด

แต่ทำไมช่วงนี้คำพูดเธอแรงแถมคอยตวาด
Told my man กูเพิ่งเป็นแฟนแต่กูโดนปั่นประสาท
มือเธอข้างนึงถือกรรไกรหัวใจผมเป็นกระดาษ

นี่มันเรื่องของเราสองคนไม่ให้ My man ช่วย
เราสองคนเป็นแฟนทำไมต้องหาคนแทนด้วย

เธอจะเอายังไงกับฉันก็ให้เธอบอกมา
คิดยังไงกับฉันถ้าไม่รักก็ให้บอกมา
เหนื่อยจะพูดกับคนอย่างเธอผมเลยเดินออกมา

description:
ชื่อเพลง : ว่าไงรูปหล่อ
ศิลปิน : สยาโม feat. YONIA
เนื้อร้อง/ทำนอง : ดีเจป๋าเพชร
เรียบเรียง : ดีเจป๋าเพชร , บาส สิทธิชัย
Mix & Mastering : บาส สิทธิชัย
กีต้าร์ : ต้องเอง 
พิณ : แว่นน้อย
Vocal Director : โอเลี้ยง สยามพล
Executive Producer : SAYAPA SINGCHOO
Producer : Bank Junnum

Sponsored by : DAZZLE ME
Spacial Thank: ศิษย์เจริญการช่าง by ช่างแก่
ขอขอบคุณ บริษัท โซลูชั่นวัน โฮลดิ้ง จำกัด

เนื้อเพลง

V.1
พวกผู้ชายสมัยเนี้ย อย่าคิดว่าตัวเองเฟี้ยวจัด 
อย่าคิดว่าไม่รู้ ดูออกเลยว่าหม้อค่ะ
อย่ามาเล่นลิ้นเลย ขอบาย  
เสือสิ้นลายเธอพูดได้ไง ถ้าอยากจะนัวเนีย 
ก็ไปเคลียกับเมียก่อนค่า

อย่ามาเล่นกับไฟเดี๋ยวมันจะไหม้เอา 
ขอร้องอย่าเล่นกับใจ เดี๋ยวเธอจะได้เศร้า 
เดี๋ยวจะได้รู้ ว่าฉันนะก็ไม่เบา 
ไปลงนรกเถอะ ขอบายแบบนี้ฉันไม่เอา


HOOK 
ว่าไงรูปหล่อ อย่าคิดว่าฉันไม่รู้ ว่าเธอเจ้าชู้ 
ฉันเคยมาก่อน 
เสือสิ้นลาย โอ้ยหน้าไม่อาย เธอพูดได้ไง หะไอ่กะล่อน 
 ถ้าอยากจะนัวจะเนีย ก็ต้องไปเคลียกับเมียพี่ก่อน 
 แพ้เสียงในหัวหรือไง ถ้าไม่รักจริงไม่ต้องมาหลอก

V.2 
ถ้าต้องเป็นชู้ หนูขอตัวบ้ายบายนะค่ะ 
 ขอยาดบล๊อคไลน์ ไม่คุยแล้วนะ ทำแบบนี้ไม่น่ารักเลย 
ก็ไม่เข้าใจ มีแฟนแล้วทำไมต้องทัก น่าเสียดายเราเจอกันช้า ไม่งั้นสองเราได้ลงเอย

เมียพี่ละจะตีหัว  
ขอตัวหนูต้องรีบหนี 
ไม่ต้องเรียกหนูว่าดาลิ้ง 
ไปเลย ไปไกลไกล ไม่เอาแบบนี้ 
ไอ่สองลิ้นสองแฉกสองใจ
 กะล่อนปลิ้นปล้อน ไม่ไหวเลยขอบาย
หนูอะรู้ว่าพี่มีใจ ให้ทำยังไงอะเมียพี่ทักมา 

อย่ามาเล่นกับไฟเดี๋ยวมันจะไหม้เอา 
ขอร้องอย่าเล่นกับใจ เดี๋ยวเธอจะได้เศร้า 
เดี๋ยวจะได้รู้ ว่าฉันนะก็ไม่เบา 
ไปลงนรกเถอะ ขอบายแบบนี่้ฉันไม่เอา


HOOK 
ว่าไงรูปหล่อ อย่าคิดว่าฉันไม่รู้ ว่าเธอเจ้าชู้ 
ฉันเคยมาก่อน 
เสือสิ้นลาย โอ้ยหน้าไม่อาย เธอพูดได้ไง หะไอ่กล่อน 
 ถ้าอยากจะนัวจะเนีย ก็ต้องไปเคลียกับเมียพี่ก่อน 
 แพ้เสียงในหัวหรือไง ถ้าวันไนท์แสตนไม่เอารูปหล่อ

Rap
มองดูมองสาริกา เลยไปถามน้องนางว่าเป็นคนที่ไหน
โปรดอย่ากลัวพี่บ่าวไปเลยพี่เข้าวัดทำบุญจะหลอกน้องได้ไง 
เธอเหมือนกับออกซิเจน เพราะถ้าขาดเธอไป พี่คงอยู่ไม่ได้
วอนขอล่ะแม่บุษบา ถือว่าเป็นบุญตา ของพี่ได้ไหม

จะจับให้ได้ถ้าหนูดิ้น 
เธอมากับพี่ก็จะมีเตียงให้หนูกลิ้ง
โซนหลังบ้าน จะมีสนามให้หนูวิ่ง
แต่ถ้าเกิดว่าหนูหิวหน้าปากซอยมีหมูปิ้งหมักขมิ้น
ไม่ได้เล่นกับไฟก็พี่มันเสือสิ้นลาย
ไม่ได้อจากจะหม้อโปรดจงเชื่อใจ
พี่ไม่ใช่พวกผู้ชายอันตราย 
รักไม่ได้หม้อ เธอไม่เอา เทล มี วาย

ผู้สาว อ้ายบ่ได้คิดแค่เด้า เด้า เด้ส เด้า
บ่าวอีสานใต้ฮักแฮงจริงใจอีหลี


HOOK 
ว่าไงรูปหล่อ อย่าคิดว่าฉันไม่รู้ ว่าเธอเจ้าชู้ 
ฉันเคยมาก่อน 
เสือสิ้นลาย โอ้ยหน้าไม่อาย เธอพูดได้ไง หะไอ่กะล่อน 
 ถ้าอยากจะนัวจะเนีย ก็ต้องไปเคลียกับเมียพี่ก่อน 
 แพ้เสียงในหัวหรือไง ถ้าวันไนท์แสตนไม่เอารูปหล่อ

ฉันเคยมาก่อน

title: PEE CLOCK - เบียว RECORD ( Official Audio )
tags: peeclock|diss|youngohm|illslick|p9d|chonburiflow|diamondmqt|gunner|younggu|brownzer|4bang
description:
lyrics
คว* สวัสดีเบียว record
ถ้าเกิดว่าของมึงเฟี้ยวจริง มึงคงไม่เปลี่ยนเซ็ตหรอก
คว* ว่าไงครับ เบียว record
ส่วนไอ bloodหน้าเสี่ยว ปล่อยแม่งไปเบียวเม็ดต่อ
คว* สวัสดีเบียว record
กูตั้งชื่อแก้งค์ให้มึงใหม่ ชื่อแกงค์ว่า เบียวเซตย่อ
เบียวสเกตหลอดอย่างมึงกูขอแค่เทคเดียว
กูไม่สนเรื่อง fake real ว่าไงแมวเหมียว record

กูเห็นพวกมึงแลอยากจะวัดไซส์
ถ้าเกิดกูเช็คอิน กูอยากจะรู้มึงจะมาตามนัดมั้ย
สันดานกูหัวเรือ แต่มึงแค่ทาสไม่ก็คนรับใช้
ถ้าเทียบเรื่องความเสถียร กูApollo แต่มึงแค่Focusrite
เจอกันต่อหน้า ไอหน้าหีมึงก็ควรโฟกัสไว้
อย่าเสือกมาซ่าแถวเอกมัยไอสัส มึงรู้จักบังมัดมั้ย
ไอนุ้ยพ่อมึงตาย ไอหน้า*มึงได้ยินกูชัดมั้ย
แร๊พมึงโคตรกระจอก โฟลวเดิมตลอดเหมือนโดนสต๊าฟไว้
ขอบคุณยังโอมที่ทำให้วงการนี้แม่งตื่นเต้น
หมากเกมนี้มันเป็นของกูและกูจะไม่ยอมให้คนอื่นเล่น
ตอนนี้กูได้หมด ไอแม่เยสอยู่ที่ใครจะเลือกเด้ง
จะTrap หรือ Old school ประตูพวกกูมึงอย่ามาเลื่อนเล่น

โมอาย สไตล์Old
Flow คำอันตรายโชว์
ไม่เล่นป๊อกเด้ง เน้นแต่ไฮโล
มึงเห็นมั้ย สไตล์โอล

เอไอหรือว่าไอโอ
ไนตรัสหรือว่าไนโตร
มึงเก๋าอ่อไอสัส ว่ายังไงโบร

ช่วงนี้เขาปล่อยกันแต่สงกรานต์เทรน
แต่ไม่รู้ทำไม ไอเหี้*นี่มันต้องการสงครามเพลง
กูอะของจริง ไอหน้าเหี้*มึงแค่ต้องการframe
เหมือนที่พี่อิลบอกมันไม่เกิดประโยชน์กับอุตสาหกรรมเพลง
ราหูมันกำลังอมจันทน์ พระเจ้ากำลังจะลงทัณฑ์
ที่มึงเช็คอินอยู่ข้างหาด เพราะจะเอาดากไปลงดัน
ชลบุรีโฟลวมีความคิดเห็นตรงกัน
ว่าคนอย่างกูไม่เคยดูถูกหรือทรยศคนฟัง

เหมือนมึงมีที่ดินแต่ว่าวันนี้มึงดันไม่มีโฉนด
พูดให้ตาย ที่ สปก มันก็ไม่มีประโยชน์
กูไม่ลอบยิง เพราะว่ากูยิงรอบเดียว
กูยอมเป็น เบียว ออฟ ลิง ดีกว่าเป็น คิงส์ ออฟ เบียว

กูบอกไปแล้วอย่าเสือกทะลึ่งมาก
กูยิงยังไงก็โดน ถ้าเกิดว่าโจรมันเผลอมาขึ้นบ้าน
จิ๊กโก๋เหี้*ไรไม่มาซึ่งๆหน้า
พี่เขาไม่ได้เก๋า เขาก็แค่เหงา อยากโดนกระทืบหน้า

เหยดแม่มึงไม่รู้อ่อ กูโอลสคูลใหม่อะไอเหี้*

เอางี้ไอสัสเดี๋ยวพวกกูแถมให้พวกมึงเรื่องนึง
เชือกมันอยู่เฉยๆ แต่ว่ามึงเลือกเองที่จะทำให้เงื่อนตึง
Diss track พี่โคตรขนมมันทำให้ผมอยากหนี
มึงสาดมาหากูแบบตรงๆมันจะได้สมศักดิ์ศรี
ที่มึงไปโพสด่าไอโอม กูถามหน่อยว่ามันผิดไร
มึงบอกว่าตัวกูเสือก งั้นมึงก็เสือกสรุปความผิดใคร
แร็พมึงกุให้แค่ผ่าน แต่ว่าสันดานมึงกูขอปิดไฟ
หลายคนที่กูสนิท มึงอย่าสะกิดเพราะเรื่องมันติดไว
ไอเหี้*แก่หน้าหี ไม่เหลือพลังแต่เสือกยังทำเก๊ก
คำพูดกูไม่ค่อยสน เพราะว่าพวกกูใช้การกระทำเช็ค
ไม่แปลกที่ไม่มีมิตร ก็เพราะชีวิตของมึงมันพังเละ
ข้างล่างกูให้มึงยำ ข้างบนกูตำเหมือนสุริยันต์เล็ก

อย่าให้กูรู้ชื่อแม่ ถ้าเกิดกูรู้ชื่อพ่อรับรองกูล้อชื่อแน่
ส่วนไอแมวเหมียว มึงกลับไปเบียวเม็ดต่อ
คว*ไรไอเหี้*เสี่ยว ไปอยู่กับเบียว record

พลาดแล้วยังเหลืองมาเจอกับไรห์ม รีฟิล
ทุกครั้งที่ตัวมึงอยู่ Alone ระวังจะโดน LGBTQ
ที่มึงรอดไปได้เนี่ยแม่งค่อนข้างฟลุค
อยากชนะผู้ชายทุกคนแต่เสือกไปแพ้พ่อบ้านตุ๊ด
อย่าตอแหลคนฟังกูรู้ว่ามึงต้องการแค่เอนเกต
ใครๆก็ดูออกว่าคุณภาพมันคนละเฟรมเรท
กูคือพายุที่ซัดหน้ามึงเหมือนกับทอร์นาโด
ได้ข่าวว่าเจอราด มันอยากจะปาดงานของพอล สโคล
ไม่ขอโทษด้วยไอสัส ที่กูทำมึงอับอาย
มึงควรจะเลิกแร๊พ แล้วไปตักขี้แมวที่อยู่ในกระบะทราย
พัทยาทุกคนเขารู้จัก PEE แต่ไม่รู้จัก นาย
อย่าหยามเด็กเมืองทะเล จะนุ้ยหรือเจ 
ยังไงก็จับตาย

โฟลวระดับพระเอก มาเจอสัมผัสระดับณเดช
มึงอย่าเสลดไอเด็กกระโปก เดี๋ยวกูปั้ดโดดไปโขกมะเงก
ไม่มีพระคุณ ไม่มีพระเดช เพราะหน้ามึงดูไม่ถูกโฉลก
ระวังมึงจะเป้นฮีทสโตรก ไอแก่กระโหลกมึงโคตรเสลด ถุ้ย

Lyrics:

[Verse 1: Shane]
An empty street, an empty house
A hole inside my heart
I'm all alone, the rooms are getting smaller
I wonder how, I wonder why
I wonder where they are
The days we had, the songs we sang together
Oh yeah

[Pre-Chorus: All, Shane]
And oh, my love
I'm holding on forever
Reaching for the love that seems so far

[Chorus: All]
So I say a little prayer
And hope my dreams will take me there
Where the skies are blue
To see you once again, my love
Overseas from coast to coast
To find a place I love the most
Where the fields are green
To see you once again, my love

[Verse 2: Brian]
I try to read, I go to work
I'm laughing with my friends
But I can't stop, to keep myself from thinking, oh no
I wonder how, I wonder why
I wonder where they are
The days we had the songs, we sang together
Oh yeah

[Pre-Chorus: All, Shane]
And oh, my love
I'm holding on forever
Reaching for the love that seems so far

[Chorus: All]
So I say a little prayer
And hope my dreams will take me there
Where the skies are blue
To see you once again, my love
Overseas from coast to coast
To find a place I love the most
Where the fields are green
To see you once again

[Bridge: Markus]
To hold you in my arms
To promise you my love
To tell you from the heart
You're all I'm thinking of
I'm reaching for the love that seems so far

[Chorus: All, Markus, Shane]
(So) So I say a little prayer
And hope my dreams will take me there
Where the skies are blue
To see you once again, my love
Overseas from coast to coast (Overseas)
To find a place I love the most
Where the fields are green
To see you once again (My love)

[Outro: All, Shane, Brian]
So I say a little prayer
My sweet love
Dreams will take me there
Where the skies are blue
To see you once again (Oh, my love)
Overseas from coast to coast
To find a place I love the most
Where the fields are green
To see you once again, my love

description:
This Summer, find your place in the universe. #Supergirl lands in theaters and IMAX June 26.

“Supergirl,” DC Studios’ newest feature film to hit the big screen, will be in theaters worldwide this summer from Warner Bros. Pictures, starring Milly Alcock in the dual role of Supergirl/Kara Zor-El. Craig Gillespie directs the film from a screenplay by Ana Nogueira.

When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.

Alcock stars alongside Matthias Schoenaerts, Eve Ridley, David Krumholtz, Emily Beecham, and Jason Momoa.

DC Studios heads Peter Safran and James Gunn are producing the film, which is based on characters from DC, Supergirl based on characters created by Jerry Siegel and Joe Shuster. The film is executive produced by Nigel Gostelow, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther. Behind the camera, Gillespie is joined by director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer Neil Lamont, editor Tatiana S. Riegel, costume designers Anna B. Sheppard and Michael Mooney, Visual Effects Supervisor Geoffrey Baumann, music supervisor Susan Jacobs and composer Claudia Sarne.

DC Studios Presents a Troll Court Entertainment / The Safran Company Production, A Film by Craig Gillespie, “Supergirl,” which will be in theaters and IMAX ® across North America on June 26, 2026, and internationally beginning 24 June 2026, distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures.

title: Destroying A World That Doesn't Exist
tags: wifies|mumbo jumbo|dream|wifies arg|at the crossroads dont turn left|the king in yellow
description:
A strange book appears in Avery's world warning him to run away, so he decides to investigate and hunt down the author - the missing player d3rlord3. But what he discovers inside his world is more than he could have ever imagined..

Avery's channel: @averylargemayo 

Voice of Avery: @andrewgaming677 
Voice of Abel/The Vessel: @Zeemyth 

ORIGINAL MUSIC BY: Ben Bracey (@benbraceymusic on instagram) 
https://soundcloud.com/benbraceymusic/sets/destroying-a-world-that-doesnt


DO NOT READ BELOW FOR SPOILERS:


d3rlord3's channel: @dhutchins333 


This is just a little part of the description where I talk about the video and there is a LOT to say about this guy. The reason this video is so long is because it was originally going to be two parts (a part 2 and a part 3) but the ending of part 2 was a little weak (end of Avery's pov) and I just felt part 3 would require way too much context. Soo we combined them into one.

I think I'm gonna post a full behind the scenes/deleted scenes video on my second channel @Twifies where I talk about how this video was made/why certain decisions were made. But something I really like are all the little headnods to some of my favorite pieces of fiction. Some more explicit, like in the library, but if you ever watched Adventure Time then those lines from the King should have sounded pretty familiar. 

This is easily the longest I've ever spent on a video and I never want it to happen again lol it feels unnatural to wait this long between uploads. I promise I'll be back to normal soon. This will either age well or it's not but this video feels pretty different from part 1 which gets me kind of scared. I think this video is lowkey not that scary, or at least it's not dense with scares and I might have lost the plot of what made part 1 good. But who knows. I think the ending slaps and the weakest scenes are (as always) the parts where you try and force fear. Aka mountain chase, and that chase after the floor disappears beneath Avery in the gray buildings. I just think you can't force fear and tension is where it shines. But who knows I've watched this video so many times I can't tell anymore. 

A note to the villain, I don't think of this as "The King in Yellow" perse, if anything it follows more from the Lovecraftian adaptation, Hastur. But I think this guy is my own adaptation of that adaptation. A King x Bill Cipher x The Lich if that makes any sense. 

Also if you want to support the project/download any of the builds then check them out here. You get every single world featured here + the world from part 1, all for $5:

BUILDS: https://horacecreations.com/products/dtl

I also want to say thank you to a few people bc without them this video would have been completely impossible. So a massive thank you to:
- Zeemyth for not only voicing but helping so much with writing the written books
- Horace and the entire team at HoraceCreations for being so good to work with and making this possible in the first place with their incredible building
- AndrewGaming67 for being so flexible and talented with the voice acting
- Wato and Kenadian for helping me with the more technical feats you've seen (ie boat phasing)
- Ben for the music and being so open to ideas and revisions
- Rekrap2 for sending me that shulker in the sky thing 4 years ago
- Parrot for all the advice and for motivating me to keep making better videos 
- Speedish for recording with me for hours and hours and sitting through my quality checks with me
- YOU for watching :) I really appreciate it 

➤➤ Twitter: https://twitter.com/WifiesWasTaken
➤➤ Discord: https://discord.gg/zAWUuWb


➤➤Links:

Tim Stephenson/The King: https://www.fiverr.com/tim_stephenson/record-a-deep-terrifying-cinematic-villain-voiceover-for-you

EPIDEMIC MUSIC I USE: https://share.epidemicsound.com/1xis5q/?playlist=uad3vzakh605efvoqoi24llhnpr9lm2y

🎵 Copyrighted music licensed from Lickd. https://lickd.co

While My Guitar Gently Weeps (Live from Madison Square Garden, New York, U.S.A, 1971 / 2009 Remaster) by George Harrison, https://t.lickd.co/l/oOPdvzdZ73p

This is NOT series called Minecraft VVSauce where I explore random features of Minecraft. Not Secret Minecraft things or Minecraft lore (like Game Theory) or Escape Rooms, but a crazy super long unfiction video where Averythemayo and d3rlord3 search for the king in yellow? But not really the king in yellow. If anything it's more like hastur x the lich x bill cipher. Not even an arg but you can call it that. It's just video where stuff goes DOWN.

awesamdude:  @awesamdude 
CaptainPuffy:  @CaptainPuffy 

We decided to call this series Minecraft Manhunt. This video is a different rendition of it, where there are SIX hunters instead of THREE hunters or just one.

This is a new Minecraft but, 1.21.11 challenge that we have decided to try. I try to beat the game, while my friend George AND my friend Sapnap AND my friend BadBoyHalo AND my friend Antfrost AND my friend awesamdude AND my friend CaptainPuffy tries to prevent me from doing it. It's a race, and it's super intense and we had a lot of laughs. I love doing these challenges.

If this video gets 500,000 likes we'll do a rematch!

Not Minecraft, But Water Rises or Minecraft, But Lava Rises, or any other but challenge like that. This is a speed run / speed runner of Minecraft against a killer / assassin
